  "findings": [
    "More than 360 degrees of total bends between pull points in the EMT run."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an intermediate pull box, conduit body, or rework the conduit routing to reduce the total cumulative bends between pull points to 360 degrees or less."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 358.26 explicitly limits the total degrees of bends between pull points (such as conduit bodies and boxes) to a maximum of 360 degrees. Exceeding this limit makes wire pulling extremely difficult and risks damaging the conductor insulation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 358.26",
    "NEC Chapter 9"
  ]
}
